discovery: Agents don't understand AGET-AGET's governance role

evidence.quote: AGET-AGET is the agent template system
evidence.misunderstanding: Thinks AGET-AGET is the template, not governance

root_cause.primary: No clear communication about AGET-AGET's role
root_cause.secondary: Agents only see template, not governance

impact.current: Agents don't know where to share discoveries

recommendation: Create standard communication explaining AGET-AGET governance role to all agents
